title: Bolsonaro son rallies the right as thousands protest Brazil government
author: FRANCE24
fullText:
To display this content from YouTube, you must enable advertisement tracking and audience measurement.

04:17
summary: Flavio Bolsonaro, son of Brazil's jailed former leader, on Sunday sought to rally and unite conservatives ahead of October elections in which he hopes to follow in his father's footsteps. Thousands of supporters of former president Jair Bolsonaro demonstrated in several Brazilian cities, calling for him to be freed from prison and slamming leftist President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva's government. FRANCE 24's Jan Onoszko reports from Rio de Janeiro.
